description: The Islamic Ideology Dissemination Organization (IIDO; Persian: Sazman-e Tablighat-e Eslami) is a state body subordinate to the [Office of the Supreme Leader](/orgs/office-of-the-supreme-leader) responsible for promoting the Islamic Republic's ideological and cultural messaging. Established in 1981, the IIDO oversees a wide range of propaganda and cultural activities including publications, art exhibitions, religious ceremonies, and media. It is the parent organization of [Mehr News Agency](/orgs/mehr-news-agency), Iran's largest official news wire. [Ali Khamenei](/people/ali-khamenei) exercises ultimate authority over the IIDO as Supreme Leader.
editorial_notes: Parent org of Mehr News Agency. Subordinate to Supreme Leader. Persian: Sazman-e Tablighat-e Eslami.
